response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~13 years of professional experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products/platforms. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI/agent tooling (MCP generators at re:cinq since April 2025) and no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy leadership, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI products at scale.
strengths: Broad full-stack/embedded/infra background with strong testing and craftsmanship discipline
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Community contributions: workshops, talks, and training on testing and web internals
concerns: Below the 15-year requirement and lacks Director/Principal-level IC scope or influence
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise; AI exposure is recent and tooling-adjacent
No cloud-platform strategy work or advising of strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Seniority/scope gap vs Director-level IC expectations
